prompt: Photorealistic cinematic fixed-camera reveal shot of the hidden cliffside workshop home at sunset. Exactly one male craftsman is visible, the same male craftsman from the reference image. Preserve the cliff, wooden entrance, terrace, stone and timber construction, realistic scale, and handcrafted appearance.
